message:
feat(mysql): integrate prepared statement binary protocol

Implements the prepared statement protocol integration into
MySqlAsyncConnection:

1. prepare_async(): Sends COM_STMT_PREPARE, parses response,
   reads param/column definitions, stores metadata in HashMap

2. query_prepared_async(): Sends COM_STMT_EXECUTE with binary
   params, reads binary protocol result set, decodes values

3. execute_prepared_async(): Same as query_prepared but returns
   affected row count

4. close_prepared_async(): Sends COM_STMT_CLOSE to release
   server-side resources

5. read_binary_result_set_async(): Parses binary protocol rows
   with NULL bitmap handling

6. parse_binary_row(): Decodes binary row data using column
   type information

Also adds decode_binary_value_with_len() to types.rs for parsing
binary protocol values with length tracking.

SharedMySqlConnection Connection trait now properly delegates
to these async methods through the mutex wrapper.

Closes bd-x1x

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
